2604.17808.title: Enabling AI ASICs for Zero Knowledge Proof
2604.17808.paper_summary: Zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) provers remain costly because multi-scalar multiplication (MSM) and number-theoretic transforms (NTTs) dominate runtime as they need significant computation. AI ASICs such as TPUs provide massive matrix throughput and SotA energy efficiency. We present MORPH, the first framework that reformulates ZKP kernels to match AI-ASIC execution. We introduce Big-T complexity, a hardware-aware complexity model that exposes heterogeneous bottlenecks and layout-transformation costs ignored by Big-O. Guided by this analysis, (1) at arithmetic level, MORPH develops an MXU-centric extended-RNS lazy reduction that converts high-precision modular arithmetic into dense low-precision GEMMs, eliminating all carry chains, and (2) at dataflow level, MORPH constructs a unified-sharding layout-stationary TPU Pippenger MSM and optimized 3/5-step NTT that avoid on-TPU shuffles to minimize costly memory reorganization. Implemented in JAX, MORPH enables TPUv6e8 to achieve up-to 10x higher throughput on NTT and comparable throughput on MSM than GZKP. Our code: https://github.com/EfficientPPML/MORPH.
2604.17808.paper_summary_zh: 零知識證明（ZKP）證明者仍然成本高昂，因為多標量乘法（MSM）和數論變換（NTTs）主導了運行時間，因為它們需要大量計算。AI ASIC，如TPU，提供巨大的矩陣吞吐量和最先進的能效。我們提出了MORPH，第一個將ZKP內核重新構造以匹配AI-ASIC執行的框架。我們引入了Big-T複雜度，一種硬體感知的複雜度模型，揭示了Big-O忽略的異構瓶頸和佈局轉換成本。在這一分析的指導下，（1）在算術層面，MORPH開發了一種以MXU為中心的擴展-RNS懶惰減少，將高精度模運算轉換為密集的低精度GEMM，消除了所有進位鏈，並且（2）在數據流層面，MORPH構建了一個統一分片的佈局靜態TPU Pippenger MSM和優化的3/5步NTT，避免在TPU上的洗牌，以最小化昂貴的內存重組。MORPH在JAX中實現，使TPUv6e8在NTT上實現高達10倍的吞吐量，並在MSM上達到與GZKP相當的吞吐量。我們的代碼：https://github.com/EfficientPPML/MORPH。
2604.17808.author: Jianming Tong et.al.
2604.17808.authors: Jianming Tong, Jingtian Dang, Simon Langowski, Tianhao Huang, Asra Ali, Jeremy Kun, Jevin Jiang, Srinivas Devadas, Tushar Krishna
